## Workflow

What choreography, rehearsal, stage-management, or sharing workflow would this
support?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Why it matters

Explain who benefits and what becomes easier.

## Alternatives

Describe any workaround or simpler version that would still help.
